note: 69-year-old male with documented peripheral artery disease, claudication at one block, ABI 0.62 on the right. History of carotid endarterectomy 2018 for asymptomatic 80% stenosis. Continues cilostazol; statin and aspirin per ASCVD prevention guidelines.
notes: Upgrades I73.9 (peripheral vascular disease, unspecified) to I70.213 (atherosclerosis of native arteries of right leg with intermittent claudication).
